title: My Ice Cream Truck
description: Do you want some sweetest dessert today in this nice hot day? Beat this summer heat with scrumptious Ice. Make fun of cooking your own frozen summer dessert with Ice Cream Maker. Select a colorful flavors of Ice Cream including vanilla, chocolate, mint chocolate chip, strawberry, Cookies & Cream, Blueberry, Coffee and many more. Mix the other ingredients and put it into the freezer and wait to a bit. Select a beautiful cup or cone and scoop the ice cream in it. When you have done pour fruit syrups on top, fill them with chocolate chips and drop some candies on top. Add some delicious toppings including berries, fruit, chocolate chips, flake bars, cookies, and much more. Get it now there is a lot of fun and it is for free.
